name_cn:
Genuine quality
The mini Saddle Bag 1955 series adds a mix-and-match vibe to this retro style series. This mini bag comes with two different shoulder straps; paired with a matching tone leather strap it presents a low-key elegant look, while paired with a red and green webbing strap it highlights the strong brand identity. The bag is made of double G interlocking pattern canvas, trimmed with brown leather.
Model: 658574 Full Leather
Dimensions: 20.5x14x5cm
